user.description: Enter the base URL of your UNIT3D private tracker and an API token. You can generate a token on the tracker under Settings → API Key.

data.allow_insecure: Allow HTTP without TLS (use only on a trusted network or VPN, e.g. LAN or Tailscale)

reauth_confirm.description: The API token for this tracker is no longer valid. Enter a new one.

error.invalid_url: Enter a valid http:// or https:// tracker URL.
error.insecure_http: This is a public HTTP address. Enable the trusted-network option below to allow sending the token without TLS.

abort.wrong_account: The new token belongs to a different account. Use a token for the account this entry was set up with.
